hierarchy.evidence: Types of data include: GCS scores, pupil scores, ventilation settings, sedation levels, fluid input and output, nutrition, use of vasopressors, antibiotics.
provenance: The BrainIT group concept and core dataset definition::chunk-8

hierarchy.evidence: secondary insults such as intracranial hypertension
provenance: The BrainIT group concept and core dataset definition::chunk-11

hierarchy.evidence: Physiotherapy sessions annotated in ICU management data.
Arterial pressure agents used in secondary insult therapy.
Jugular venous desaturations.
White cell count.
Routine nursing care.
Bedside interventions.
Patient transport.

Intracranial pressure (ICP).
Cerebral perfusion pressure (CPP).
